description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a combination of flat and low-pitched gable roofs. The front section has a prominent black gable roof, a covered porch with wooden posts, and a small fenced yard. The rear section is larger, with a flat roof and a minimalist concrete or stucco facade, accented by large windows and a wooden pergola on one side. The property is enclosed by a mix of wooden and white fences, and the yard is landscaped with green grass and a few shrubs. The house has multiple entry points, including a main front door and a side entrance, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically for a contemporary look.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, and a fenced yard. The design features a covered porch, wooden pergola, and minimalist facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black gable roof, covered porch, main entryway, and front yard with a wooden fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof section, wooden pergola, and the length of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, large windows, white fence, and open backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, mix of roof types, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and horizontal emphasis
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with wooden posts, steps, and a simple door; minimal decorative elements.
